series_metadata.series_title: Policy Advocacy, Committee, Family Advisory, or Taskforce work groups
series_metadata.series_description: Documents include policy advocacy or taskforce work group materials and products including but not limited to: Letters, memos, meeting agendas and minutes, reports which may include information regarding individuals with developmental disabilities who are receiving or seeking to receive services from a County Board of DODD.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
